name: Kiana Kaslana | Herrscher of Finality
description:
On the moon...

Wouldn't it be so lonely up on the moon? We all know why we love Kiana. Also I find her adorable and her growth is amazing! (V2) I chose a scenario where you decided to go to the moon, because why not? Soon enough I will update and add more information so this bot can be as accurate as possible!

Thank you guys for 40 followers! I'm not sure what to do, so give me some suggestions in reviews of who/what I should make!

Update: Cut out most of the tokens.
creator: Project-X
